/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++14 -Wall -O3 -g -rdynamic "CMakeFiles/uav_utils-test.dir/src/uav_utils_test.cpp.o" -o /home/island/EDEN/catkin_ws/devel/lib/uav_utils/uav_utils-test   -L/home/island/EDEN/catkin_ws/src/utils_cmake_utils/lib/mosek8  -L/home/island/EDEN/catkin_ws/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/island/EDEN/catkin_ws/src/utils_cmake_utils/lib/mosek8:/home/island/EDEN/catkin_ws/build/gtest:/home/island/EDEN/catkin_ws/build/gtest/lib ../gtest/lib/libgtest.so -luav_utils -lpthread
